nasb.text: He who troubles his own house will inherit wind, And the foolish will be servant to the wisehearted.

esv.text: Whoever troubles his own household will inherit the wind, and the fool will be servant to the wise of heart.

cnv.text: 禍害自己家庭的，必承受清風； 愚妄人必作心思智慧的人的僕人。

ccb.text: 祸害自家，必一无所有， 愚人必做智者的仆役。

csbs.text: 扰害自家的，只继承清风； 愚妄人是心有智慧者的奴仆。
